data.current_description: Lists all resources of a given configuration type within a module.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all configuration resources of a specified type within a given module. Requires moduleId and typeId path parameters to identify the module and resource type. Returns a ResourceListResponse containing an array of Resource objects with their properties and metadata. Useful for discovering existing resources before creating or modifying configurations.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about required parameters, response structure, and practical use cases. Added details about path parameters, response schema reference, and context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Creates a new configuration resource within a module.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new configuration resource of a specified type within a module. Requires moduleId and typeId path parameters, and a CreateResourceRequest body containing the resource name and configuration data. Returns the newly created Resource object with assigned properties. This operation modifies the module's configuration state and persists the resource to the Ignition Gateway.

data.current_description: Deletes a specific named resource identified by its module, type, name, and signature.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a specific configuration resource from a module. Requires four path parameters: moduleId (module identifier), typeId (resource type), name (resource name), and signature (resource version/signature identifier). Returns a SuccessMessage confirming deletion. This operation permanently removes the resource from the Ignition Gateway configuration and cannot be undone without restoration procedures.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about parameter purposes and critical side effects. Added explanations for each parameter's role, response schema reference, and emphasized the permanent nature of deletion. This helps AI agents understand the destructive nature and ensure proper precautions before execution.
